textPlain: Do they credit your account if you were impacted?  Or it's just "sorry 'bout 'dat month of trash"?Unfortunate timing, as I am rooting for Anthropic as the underdog, but feel compelled to use whatever works best.  Since mid-August I've demoted Claude to only putting the fire on UIs and am getting amazing results with GPT-5 for everything else.  Given the nonstop capacity warnings on codex cli, I might not be the only one.
